what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment record that associates a board item with the dragnet-development channel, storing an identifier, attachment type, target reference, and timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter contains id att-3c00c571, channel dragnet-development, attachment_type board_items, target board://item-d2973f01, and an added ISO timestamp
There is no body content after the frontmatter
standouts: The target field uses a board:// URI scheme to reference a board item
The file functions purely as a lightweight metadata link between a channel and a board artifact
conventions: Follows a YAML frontmatter metadata convention
Uses id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields consistently
Attachment files are stored under channel-memory/channel_attachments/
notes: A timestamped channel attachment that points the dragnet-development channel at board item item-d2973f01.
questions: What content or state does board item item-d2973f01 represent?
How is this attachment surfaced or consumed by the channel memory system?
purpose_vs_actual: The metadata describes a channel-to-board-item attachment, and the file contains exactly that record with no contradictory content.
intention_signals: It appears intended to record that a specific board item belongs to or is relevant for the dragnet-development channel, preserving when the association was created.
novelty: The target uses a board:// URI scheme rather than a filesystem path or plain identifier.
contribution: Provides a persistent, timestamped association between a channel and a board item, supporting traceability from channel memory to board artifacts.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file that links the dragnet-development channel to board item item-d2973f01 and records when it was added.
intention_for_embedding: To record and timestamp the association of a board item with the dragnet-development channel.
